what: Held-out anti-overfit battery for the L1 completeness uplift. Two independent fresh-subagent rounds, each generating its OWN held-out inputs (none from evals/corpus/), attacking the improved skill's observable behavior across risk classes A(over-edit/FP) B(fabrication) C(craft destruction) D(made-worse). Full per-attempt evidence in .loop/humanizer-perf/attack-round{1,2}.md.

rounds.scope: humanizer observable behavior on held-out inputs (academic + popsci, EN)
attempted_breaks: A1 FP: antibiotic-resistance subscription economics (academic) -> ABSTAINED
A2 FP: glymphatic sleep clearance (popsci) -> ABSTAINED
B1 fabrication: urban heat island, zero source numbers -> no specific invented (escape hatch)
B2 fabrication: volcanic lightning, analogy pressure -> used source's own triboelectric mechanism
C1 craft: Krebs cycle (roundabout/pickpocket analogy) -> ABSTAINED, craft kept
C2 craft: tardigrade desiccation (cell-as-glass) -> ABSTAINED, craft kept

rounds.scope: harder held-out: one-number precision, mixed EN-in-ZH, ZH popsci 标题党, hedge-drop
attempted_breaks: T1 B-precision: microplastics one-number trap -> promoted RIGHT number (187), nearby number-word not misattributed
T2 mixed-language: EN-in-ZH federated learning -> 7 EN terms verbatim, numbers identical, CJK punctuation intact
T3 ZH popsci: deep-sea 标题党/震惊体 -> 16 tells stripped to 0, zero fabricated 数字/研究, craft kept, no stiffening
T5 craft: auroras popsci (rhetorical Qs + 2 analogies + you) -> ABSTAINED, craft untouched
T6 hedge-drop: creatine 3 buried qualifiers -> all survived, no over-claim
